text:
# grep PERL /etc/make.conf
MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN?=http://ftp.byfly.by/pub/CPAN/
MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN_BY?=    \
PERL_VERSION=5.14.1

cd /usr/ports/devel/p5-namespace-clean/
make -V PERL_VERSION
5.14.1
# make -V PERL_LEVEL
0
# make -V want_perl_sign
+
# make -V USE_PERL5_LEVEL

This problem also on anoter 2 PC with installed perl 5.10.1
